competitors.name: HTTrack
competitors.keyDifference: No JavaScript rendering (last updated 2017); SiteGrabber uses Playwright for full browser rendering of modern SPA frameworks
competitors.notes: Classic open-source offline browser. Recursive downloading, link remapping, resumable mirroring. Cannot capture dynamically generated content

competitors.name: Cyotek WebCopy
competitors.keyDifference: Explicitly lacks JavaScript parsing; SiteGrabber's Playwright rendering captures the full rendered DOM with resume support
competitors.notes: Free Windows tool. Regex filtering, scheduled downloads, duplicate detection, robots.txt enforcement. Latest v1.9.1 (Sep 2023)

competitors.name: websitedownloader.org
competitors.keyDifference: Cloud service with page limits requiring third-party upload; SiteGrabber runs locally with Playwright, unlimited pages, and resume support
competitors.notes: Modern browser-based HTTrack replacement using headless Chrome. JS rendering, React/Vue/Angular/Next.js compatible. No installation needed

competitors.name: Crawl4AI
competitors.keyDifference: Optimized for AI text extraction, not offline browsable copies; SiteGrabber preserves full site structure with link remapping
competitors.notes: Popular open-source web crawler (62.3k GitHub stars). Markdown extraction, JS execution, anti-bot detection, MCP server support

competitors.name: wget (GNU)
competitors.keyDifference: No JavaScript rendering or browser engine; SiteGrabber uses Playwright for full rendering of modern websites
competitors.notes: Venerable command-line recursive downloader. HTTP/HTTPS/FTP, link conversion, resumable. Available on all platforms

competitors.name: SiteSucker
competitors.keyDifference: macOS-exclusive with no Windows support or JS rendering; SiteGrabber is Windows-native with Playwright rendering
competitors.notes: macOS-only website downloader. Native UI, resume support, link localization. Mac App Store distribution
